https://forums.playbattlegrounds.com/topic/35819-black-background-no-skybox-issue/

Please try the following troubleshooting tips to attempt to fix the issue:

Verify integrity of game files. Right click on PUBG in your Steam games library, click properties, local files and then verify integrity of game files.
Clean/Fresh install of your graphics drivers. Instructions here. Links for AMD & NVIDIA.
Complete All Windows Updates. Instructions here. The game is known to crash without some of the most recent Windows updates.
Update/Reinstall Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015. Instructions here.
If any of these steps work for you, please do respond here letting us know that it worked for you, so we can better help other players with the same issue.

Thank you!
